TimeEntry.Title: Network Scan
TimeEntry.Notes: Log in to the following server and perform the steps mentioned below:-SERVER03. Open Network detective tool site. Download packages for the AD. Extract the same in a specific location. Run the scannin

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: phone call to discuss what is needed. Will send templates tomorrow.

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked out generated reports and compile accounts that need to be verified.

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: Work on sftp with Chcuk

TimeEntry.Title: SFTP Server
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed documentation for SFTP server. Called Chuck and scheduled to go over what they already have set up at 5pm.

TimeEntry.Title: SFTP Server
TimeEntry.Notes: After several attempts to restart the SSH server, ended up uninstalling it completely and reinstalling. Created new ssh keys for Chuck and was able to get the SFTP working. Tested from my computer as

TimeEntry.Title: SFTP Server
TimeEntry.Notes: Verified configurations for multi user setup with documentation from Microsoft.

TimeEntry.Title: SFTP Server
TimeEntry.Notes: Attempted to create user settings but there is a caveat in which the user needs to log into the system when using Windows. Spoke to Chuck and Amy and it was decided that since it's just for this on

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: First 50 pages done

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: work on next 50 pages of security manual and then pages 50-90 of continuity procedure

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: continue work next 50 pages

TimeEntry.Title: Work on Compliance
TimeEntry.Notes: Finished Security Manual and through page 75 on business continuity

TimeEntry.Title: new FTP ready?
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to SERVER03 and checked for sftp solution installed on it. Found that openSSH in used for sftp. Created a new user and tested with winSCP, user was able to login. Searched about the folders

TimeEntry.Title: Other
TimeEntry.Notes: worked on ssh setup with lalit

TimeEntry.Title: new FTP ready?
TimeEntry.Notes: Sent instructions to Sydney to create a remote session. Connected to Server03 and share SFTP2 folder with full permission. Connected to her machine and accessed the folder using network and mapped as

TimeEntry.Title: Lag teramind agent
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the teramind portal and searched machine with user's mail id but did not find any. Asked for the computer name and searched with it and agent was found installed on the machine. Sent a

TimeEntry.Title: Audit report on Pankti
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed myaudit portal and created user for Amy Port, setup password and gave her permission on LAG department. Logged in with her user but she is able to see all clients. Troubleshot the issue and w

TimeEntry.Title: Pankti Login Time
TimeEntry.Notes: Received call from Nikki and explained her about myaudit dashboard and the reports related to users. Sent her screenshots of the way to fetch the reports.

TimeEntry.Title: Amy with Logan Ad Group is on the phone and needs help with her computer
TimeEntry.Notes: Call was received from user for system logs to be generated. Work with the her and go to myaudit portal and assist her to get the data.

TimeEntry.Title: FTP Server for LAG
TimeEntry.Notes: work on sftp server for lag
